basic.description:
{Basic Scouting}

Allows your hero to see 1 square further into the shroud, increases 50 land movement points per level and 1 mithril/day

advanced.description:
{Advanced Scouting}

Allows your hero to see 3 square further into the shroud, increases 50 land movement points per level and 1 mithril/day

expert.description:
{Expert Scouting}

Allows your hero to see 5 square further into the shroud, increases 50 land movement points per level and 1 mithril/day
